entities.name: Raphael
entities.raw_quote: Coniuro super te Raphael angelum qui est prepositus diei dominici

entities.name: Gabriel
entities.raw_quote: Coniuro super te Gabriel, qui est prepositus diei secundo, scilicet Lune

entities.name: Samael
entities.raw_quote: Coniuro super te, Samael, angelo qui esfi prepositus diei tercio, scilicet Martis

entities.name: Michael
entities.raw_quote: Coniuro super te, angele magne Michahel, qui es prepositus diei 4o

entities.name: Satquiel
entities.raw_quote: Coniuro super te, Satquiel, angele magne qui est- prepositus diei Jouis

entities.name: Anael
entities.raw_quote: Coniuro super te, angele magne Anael, qui es prepositus diei sexto

entities.name: Captiel
entities.raw_quote: Coniuro Captiel, qui prepositus es- diei septimo, qui est - dies sabbati

entities.name: Saytam
entities.raw_quote: Die ergo dominico regnat et seruit rex Saytam. Coadiutores sui sunt- Taatus, Candas, Vanibal

entities.name: Almodab
entities.raw_quote: Et die Lune regnat et seruit rex Almodab. Coadiutores sui sunt Sylol, Millalu, Abuzaba

entities.name: rex filius dyabulD
entities.raw_quote: Die Martis regnat et serait rex filius dyabulD Coadiutores sunt Carmath, Utanaual, Pascami

entities.name: Saba
entities.raw_quote: Die Mercurij regnat et seruit rex Saba. Coadiutores sui sunt- Conas, Pactas, Sanbras

entities.name: Madrath filius Arath
entities.raw_quote: Die Jouis regnat et seruit rex Madrath, filius Arath. Coadiutores sui sunt Hyrti uel Hyiti, Ignaro,- Quiron, Saalalebeth

entities.name: Saabotes
entities.raw_quote: Die Veneris [75v] regnat rex et seruit Saabotes. Coadiutores sui sunt Nassath, Ynasa

entities.name: Hayton
entities.raw_quote: Die Saturni regnat Hayton, Assayby. Coadiutores sui sunt Abimalyb et Haybalydoth et Yfla

entities.name: Adonay
entities.raw_quote: Coniuro et confirmo super vos... in nomine Ad on ay, Adonay...

entities.name: Sadaye
entities.raw_quote: in nomine Sadaye, Saday, Cados, Cados, Cados, altus...

entities.name: Yhwh-related names (Eye, Yhaa, etc.)
entities.raw_quote: ...qui est ille qui fuit, est, et erit, Eye, Alorave... Yhon, super terrain que sigilla terra est, honorato, precioso nomine suo Yhaa

entities.name: Tetragrammaton
entities.raw_quote: occidens and Tetragramaton at the right...

entities.name: Agla
entities.raw_quote: oriens and Agla at the left

entities.name: Adonay (in circle formula)
entities.raw_quote: septentrion [sic] and Adonay at the bottom

entities.name: Sabboth
entities.raw_quote: Tetragramaton at the right, septentrion [sic] and Adonay at the bottom, oriens and Agla at the left... Sabaoth... marked just outside

entities.name: Circle of CLM 849

attributes.description: triple circular band with divine names

entities.raw_quote: Figure at top offol. 68v: a triple circular band, with Sabaoth and meridies marked just outside... Hunc circulum facio in nomine dei Patris omnipotentis...

entities.name: Assandarium (assandalum)
entities.raw_quote: Suffumigium dies dominice assandalum croceum vel rubeum uel simile sibi

entities.name: Aloes (aloes)
entities.raw_quote: Die Lune est aloes, anacap, uel simile sibi

entities.name: Piper (pepper)
entities.raw_quote: Die Martis est piper aut abana, cyg b uel sibi simile

entities.name: Abana (abana)
entities.raw_quote: Die Martis est piper aut abana, cyg b uel sibi simile

entities.name: Cygnus (cyg b)
entities.raw_quote: Die Martis est piper aut abana, cyg b uel sibi simile

entities.name: Altast
entities.raw_quote: Die Mercurij est altast aut ei simile

entities.name: Olibanum
entities.raw_quote: Die Jouis est olibanum aut croceum uel ei simile

entities.name: Almastic
entities.raw_quote: Die Veneris est almastic aut lignum radim uel ei simile

entities.name: Sulphur
entities.raw_quote: Die Saturni est assandaron et sulphur aut ei simile

entities.name: Thus Odee Capre
entities.raw_quote: Et si in die Saturni operare volueris ad ligandas lignas,- erit suffumigium thus Odee Capre

entities.name: Silver (argentum)
entities.raw_quote: Prima hora diei fac ymaginem canis ex argento uel stanno- puro

entities.name: Tin (stannum)
entities.raw_quote: Prima hora diei fac ymaginem canis ex argento uel stanno- puro

entities.name: Red blood (sangwine rubeo)
entities.raw_quote: cum sangwine rubeo et involues earn in panno albo nouo

entities.name: White cloth (panno albo nouo)
entities.raw_quote: cum sangwine rubeo et involues earn in panno albo nouo

entities.name: Cera (beeswax)
entities.raw_quote: iunges ymagines, conglutinando- 1 eas cum cera

entities.name: Lune (Moon) names (Lyara, Lyalguana, etc.)
entities.raw_quote: Hec sunt nomina: Lyara, Lyalguana, Loaffar, Vialuarab, Lebara, Lebarion, Layasales

entities.name: Amicicia names (Malthayl, Caramel, etc.)

attributes.function: divine names inscribed on images for friendship

entities.raw_quote: Et hec sunt ista vij nomina, hec scribes: Malthayl, Caramel, Azariel, Zaraimayl,- Parsail, Porbayl, Seralabelis

entities.name: Dardiel
entities.raw_quote: Diei dominico presunt tres angeli, scilicet Raphahel, Dardiel et- Vrlacafel

entities.name: Vrlacafel
entities.raw_quote: Diei dominico presunt tres angeli, scilicet Raphahel, Dardiel et- Vrlacafel

entities.name: Sammyel
entities.raw_quote: Die Lune presunt- hij: Gab[ri]el, Michael, Sammyel

entities.name: Barmaly
entities.raw_quote: Diei Martis presunt hij, scilicet Satyel, Sanyel, Barma- [76v] ly

entities.name: Gemi
entities.raw_quote: Diei Mercurij presunt hij, scilicet Gemi, Sabael, Sarpiel, Muriel

entities.name: Pacta
entities.raw_quote: Diei Jouis presunt hij, scilicet Pacta, Castiel, Assassael

entities.name: Sarquiel
entities.raw_quote: Diei Veneris presunt hij, scilicet Anael, Sarquiel, Sacquiel

entities.name: Mataton
entities.raw_quote: Diei Saturni presunt hij, scilicet Captiel, Mataton, Sartquiel

entities.name: Sartquiel (Satraquel)
entities.raw_quote: Diei Saturni presunt hij, scilicet Captiel, Mataton, Sartquiel, id est Satraquel

entities.name: Yayn (hour name)
entities.raw_quote: Prima ergo diei hora dicitur Yayn. In hac hora facienda est carta ad destruendas voces hominum et mala verba eorum et lingwas ligandas

entities.name: Yan (hour name)
entities.raw_quote: Secunda enim hora diei dicitur Yan, Or, et in ea operaberis ad amiciciam et graciam...

entities.name: Nassura (hour name)
entities.raw_quote: Tercia vero hora diei dicitur Nassura. In ea facias cartam uel ymagines ad venerandum- feras vel aues...

entities.name: Sala (hour name)
entities.raw_quote: Quarta hora diei dicitur Sala. In ea fac cartam uel ymaginem ad ligandum omnes bestias siluestres, leones, vrsos...

entities.name: Sadadat (hour name)
entities.raw_quote: Quinta hora diei dicitur Sadadat. In ea fac cartas ad ligaciones et ad applicandas quaslibet bestias...

entities.name: Tamhut (hour name)
entities.raw_quote: Sexta hora diei dicitur Tamhut. In ea operari poteris ad extrahendum captiuos de carcere, ad ligatos soluendos

entities.name: Caror (hour name)
entities.raw_quote: Septima hora diei dicitur Caror. In ea operatur ad ponendum pacem inter reges

entities.name: Tariel (hour name)
entities.raw_quote: Octaua hora diei dicitur Tariel. In ea operari poteris ad mandeolenam et discor- [77v] diam- ponendam inter homines

entities.name: Karon (hour name)
entities.raw_quote: Nona hora diei dicitur Karon. In ea facienda est carta ad itincrandum 1 uel ad eundum inter latrones sine timore

entities.name: Hyon (hour name)
entities.raw_quote: Decima hora diei dicitur Hyon. In ea operari poteris ad demonia uel demoniacos uel ventum malum uel pauorem uel iuuandum ad dominas

entities.name: Nathalon (hour name)
entities.raw_quote: Vndecima hora diei dicitur Nathalon. In ea operari poteris ad proouocandum sangwinis fluxum in mulieribus et ad ligandum viram cum muliere uel e contrario

entities.name: Abat (hour name)
entities.raw_quote: Duodecima hora diei dicitur Abat. In ea operari poteris inter maliuolos ad pacem ponendam inter viram et mulierem

entities.name: Leron (nocturnal hour)
entities.raw_quote: Prima hora noctis dicitur Leron. In ea fac ad demoniacos opera tua, aut ad uentos malos aut ad congregandas et loquitur cum eis

entities.name: Latol (nocturnal hour)
entities.raw_quote: Secunda hora noctis dicitur Latol. In ea operari poteris ad piscariam et ad omina nascencia aque

entities.name: Hami (nocturnal hour)
entities.raw_quote: Tercia hora noctis dicitur Hami. In ea operari poteris ad accendendum uel ad exti[n]gwendum ignem...

entities.name: Atyn (nocturnal hour)
entities.raw_quote: Quarta hora noctis dicitur Atyn. In ea operari [78r] poteris ad destraendum domum uel huiusmodi ad expellendum homines de loco ad locum

entities.name: Caron (nocturnal hour)
entities.raw_quote: Quinta hora noctis dicitur Caron. In ea fac questiones vt in sompnis videat quod futuram est in mundo uel in diebus uel in annis et ad secreta reuelanda

entities.name: Zaia (nocturnal hour)
entities.raw_quote: Sexta hora noctis dicitur Zaia. In ea operari poteris ad arbores et fractus earam et ad ceteras plantas terre...

entities.name: Nectius (nocturnal hour)
entities.raw_quote: Septima hora dicitur Nectius. In ea operari poteris ad expellendum homines de domo sua uel quod infirmetur uel quod moriatur

entities.name: Tafat (nocturnal hour)
entities.raw_quote: Octaua hora noctis 2 dicitur Tafat. In ea poteris operari ad inimicicaam ponendam inter quos voluerint

entities.name: Conassuor (nocturnal hour)

attributes.function: bind tongues, gain access to rulers

entities.raw_quote: Nona hora noctis dicitur Conassuor. In ea poteris operari ad ligaciones li[n]gwaram aut ad intrandum ad reges et dominos

entities.name: Algo (nocturnal hour)
entities.raw_quote: Decima hora noctis dicitur Algo. In ea operari poteris ad destraendas li[n]gwas uel omnem cogitacionem super te aut concilium malum quod super te cogitatum fuerit

entities.name: Caltraa (nocturnal hour)
entities.raw_quote: Vndecima hora noctis dicitur Caltraa. In ea operari poteris que volueris in auibus, ad eas ligandas- uel capiendas

entities.name: Salaij (nocturnal hour)
entities.raw_quote: Duodecima hora noctis dicitur Salaij. In ea poteris [78v] operari ad inveniendum quidquid predictum est uel ad reuelacionem furti uel maloram factoram

entities.name: Gaffriel
entities.raw_quote: 5e Gaffriel

entities.name: Cafriel
entities.raw_quote: Ecce sigillum Caffrielis,- angeli cuius Stella est Saturnus

entities.name: Mathael
entities.raw_quote: et angelus eius Michael uel Mathael

entities.name: Adonav (variant of Adonay)

attributes.function: used in Mars and Mercury conjurations

entities.raw_quote: per nomen domini Adonav... et per nomen Adonav, dei viui et veri

entities.name: Cados (variant of Kadosh)
entities.raw_quote: ...Cados, Cados, Cados...

entities.name: Sadav (variant of Saday)
entities.raw_quote: ...Sadav, Ya, Sar, domini formatoris seculorum...

entities.name: Yhah (YHWH-related)
entities.raw_quote: ...Yhaa...

entities.name: Eloy (variant of Elohim)
entities.raw_quote: ...Eloy, Arar, Eloym, Eloym...

entities.name: Asaame/Asaomie/Asamye (angelic names)
entities.raw_quote: ...Asaame, Asaomie, Asamye...

entities.name: Thytagora (Mercury hour angel)
entities.raw_quote: ...quorum Thytagora, angelo maiori, ford atque potent if

entities.name: Orophaniel (Lunar angel)
entities.raw_quote: ...qui seruiunt Oraphaniely, angelo magno...

entities.name: Acynerim (Mars angel)
entities.raw_quote: ...ministrando Acynerim, angelo magno...

entities.name: Salamia (Solar angel)
entities.raw_quote: ...angelo magno et honorato, Salamia...

entities.name: Daghyel (Venus angel)
entities.raw_quote: ...coram Daghyel, angelo magno principi...

entities.name: Boel (Saturn angel)
entities.raw_quote: ...seruiencium exercitui septimo coram Boel, angelo magno...

entities.name: Pastor (Jupiter angel)
entities.raw_quote: ...pastore angelo magno sancto et potenti principi...

entities.name: Icibores (speaker in conjuration)
entities.raw_quote: ...quod pro me Icibores et adimpleas omnem voluntatem meam...

entities.name: Haa (divine name)
entities.raw_quote: ...et respondebunt voluntati tue. Et sunt ex nominibus creatoris... Haa...

entities.name: Subae (divine name)
entities.raw_quote: ...Subae, Guabas...

entities.name: Guabas (divine name)
entities.raw_quote: ...Guabas...

entities.name: Ynissamon (divine name)
entities.raw_quote: ...Ynissamon...

entities.name: Barian (divine name)
entities.raw_quote: ...Barian
